title: sabicea aurea
intro: Sabicea aurea, also known as the golden sabicea, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to tropical Africa, and its leaves and bark have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sabicea aurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Sabicea aurea include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
